titleStmt.title: SII 11.60: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 60. (B.K. No. 272 of 1927-28). BANAŚAṄKARĪ, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE TEMPLE OF BANAŚAṄKARĪ.

summary.p: The inscription refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva (1) and purports to be the memorial pillar set up in front of the goddess Banadadēvī by Sāhasa-Bhīma Manevergade Kētimayya on Sunday, Vaiśākha, ba. 8 of the cyclic year Raktākshin falling in Śaka 946 (= Sunday, 3rd May, A.D. 1024). Kētimayya is stated to be a servant of Mahāsāmanta Dāsarasa who must be identical with the chief Dasarasa mentioned in No. 58 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
jjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājya mutta
rōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire śrīmanmahāsāma ntaṁdā
sarasara divyaśrīpādapadmōpajīvi
samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmā
tyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhu
maṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasampannaṁ parivā
rakaṁbha kāryyabrihaspati sāhasabhīma
nelagōṭemallaṁ koṇḍeya taḷaprahāri
yiḍuvarādityaṁ giridurggasiṅghaṁ
moneya muṁkoḷvara peṇḍiragaṇḍaṁ pe
rggeḍe hīradāsana sannā hasubhanā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
manmaneverggeḍe kētimayyaṅgaḷ sa
kavarṣa 946 neya raktākṣi saṁva
tsarada vaiśākha bahuḷa Aṣṭami
yādityavāradaṁdu śrībanada
dēviya munta nilisida sāhasa
bhīmana śiḷāstaṁbha . kē bha
taṁma mahīśakoṭa
pati caladutsāhadoḷ saṁda bhīma
yoḷ puṣpāyudhaṁ
ḷ nelasutaṁ saucado
vikramadoḷ sattaṁ mahā
ḷdanū negaḻdaṁ . kaṁ . tanūdya
taṁ [�] kuṭu geri kētaninde dharmi
janiṁdoḍa madrijēśanoḷ . dharmmā
śanendoḍa miḷādharaneṁ doḍaṁ
vairiyeṁdoḍaṁ mahirājayu
[gādhipanoḷ dharmmānvi
yadaṁ dharmmajanendoḍaṁ praḷeya
meṁnneda mātu pēḻdu kuvarnnaram
caḷadaṁkakārtti . parasido ḍaneghaṁ śrī
dāsa bhūpanosedoḍe kētaṁ tana
gidu kīrttige lāñcana menutaṁ sthā
pisi kīrttimūḷaṁ staṁbhaṁ subhraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
